name: Microwave Macadamia-Orange Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch square pan with foil.
2. In a glass bowl, melt butter on High for 1 minute.
3. Stir in sugar and evaporated milk.
4. Cook on High for 8 minutes, stirring every 3 minutes.
5. Add marshmallows and chocolate; stir until smooth.
6. Stir in macadamia nuts and orange liqueur.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Cut into pieces and chill until firm.
Makes 2 pounds.
